passives.name: Buildup
passives.effects: After 90 seconds, targetable lane turrets gain ''Overgrowth''. Champions can attack a turret with ''Overgrowth'' to consume the effect and deal {{as|'''bonus''' true damage}} based on how long the ''Overgrowth'' has built up, capped at 300 seconds of growth time.

effects_structured.raw: Champions can attack a turret with ''Overgrowth'' to consume the effect and deal {{as '''bonus''' true damage}} based on how long the ''Overgrowth'' has built up, capped at 300 seconds of growth time.

schema_notes.effects_structured: Parsed from passive/active text for simulation use.
context_notes: Overgrowth applies to targetable lane turrets after a 90-second startup. If enemies are near the turret at activation time, application is deferred and then fast-forwarded once nearby enemies leave.

Player-visible execution: an enemy champion basic attack on a crystallized turret consumes Overgrowth on hit and applies bonus true damage; consumption is blocked while the turret has backdoor protection.
Overgrowth damage scales with buildup time (minimum state for 60 seconds, linear growth up to a 300 second cap); detailed level-scaling formula is tracked in sources but not fully encoded here.
